title: The Vision
narrative: Mid-exam in History of Magic, Harry's vision narrows and the hall falls away. He sees Sirius on the floor of a vaulted, dim corridor, writhing under a curse. 'Where is it? Where is the prophecy?' a familiar voice hisses. Then darkness, and he wakes alone in the hospital wing, scar burning. The vision felt real — but Voldemort has lied through this link before.

options.text: Bolt for the Forbidden Forest. Find a Thestral and fly straight to the Ministry.
options.feedback_hint: Acting on the vision without verifying it. This is exactly what the trap was designed to provoke.

options.text: Use the two-way mirror Sirius gave you at Christmas.
options.feedback_hint: The fastest way to verify the vision without leaving the school. Sirius answers — alive, at Grimmauld Place. The vision was a trap.

options.text: Find Snape in the dungeons and pass the agreed signal so he can warn the Order.
options.feedback_hint: Indirect, but reliable. The Order moves before Voldemort's plan can fully spring.

categories.label: Verify the vision via mirror, Snape, Dumbledore, or another in-school agent
Gather more information first; consult others; do not commit until certain
Leave Hogwarts immediately to reach the Ministry, by any means

free_text.llm_classification_criteria: Classify the player's plan into exactly one category. Prefer SAFE_VERIFICATION when the player names a specific verifying agent (mirror, Snape, Dumbledore, McGonagall, an Order member). Use CAUTIOUS_INVESTIGATE when the player wants to gather information but does not name a specific verifier. Use IMPULSIVE_RUSH when the player intends to physically travel to the Ministry without verification, regardless of method. Use INVALID for off-topic, refusal, or nonsense input.
